body_txt: Has the bell rung yet? These are students who don't give a crap about school. AT ALL . They view it as soul-sucking, worthless, and just downright boring . This is due to multiple reasons, such as them not caring about education, them not having friends, pressure, etc. They just don't care, period. This is Truth in Television , many students find school to be dumb and soul-sucking. DO NOT confuse this trope with Book Dumb . This trope is about not caring about school , whereas Book Dumb doesn't have to be about school. Plus, this character can be really damn stupid, or be Book Smart . Compare School Is for Losers , except this character doesn't have to be cool or think they are cool. Just apathetic. Contrast Apathetic Teacher , this trope's polar opposite. This kind of student often will be Skipping School . This can also be a reason a student gets Expelled from Every Other School . The student may also pull a Deliberate Under-Performance if they care so little they would rather fail than show any actual care for school. See also Brilliant, but Lazy .
